case_title: MATAS LA SERNA VS. BANK OF AMERICAN CORP.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA SERNA, MATAS AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICAN CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,883.59 FILED BY LA SERNA, MATAS AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICAN CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICAN CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA SERNA, MATAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICAN CORP. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MANUELA COLLADO--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED; STAMPED - SERVED MAR-25-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICAN CORP.
